# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-03-19 | **更新时间**: 06:53 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[23:05]` **Diakonos Oncology 将在 AACR 和 ANN 2026 上展示 DOC1021 (dubodencel) 治疗胰腺癌和胶质母细胞瘤的临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Diakonos Oncology to Showcase DOC1021 (dubodencel) Clinical Data in Pancreatic Cancer and Glioblastoma at AACR and ANN 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **Aspen Neuroscience 在 AD/PD™ 2026 年阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病国际会议上进行最新口头报告，宣布其 ASPIRO 临床试验的 12 个月积极数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Aspen Neuroscience Announces Positive 12‑Month Data from its ASPIRO Clinical Trial in a Late‑Breaking Oral Presentation at the AD/PD™ 2026 International Conference on Alzheimer's and Parkinson's Diseases* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **🏛️监管 | iECURE 入选美国 FDA 化学、制造和控制开发和准备试点计划，以在计划的 BLA 提交之前支持 ECUR-506 的制造准备**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *iECURE Selected for U.S. FDA Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls Development and Readiness Pilot Program to Support Manufacturing Readiness of ECUR-506 Ahead of Planned BLA Submission* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[19:00]` **GentiBio 宣布 GNTI-122 治疗最近诊断的 1 型糖尿病的 POLARIS 1 期临床试验中第一位受试者接受给药**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *GentiBio Announces First Participant Dosed in POLARIS Phase 1 Clinical Trial of GNTI-122 in Recently Diagnosed Type 1 Diabetes* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[07:00]` **Verismo Therapeutics 将在 AACR 2026 年年会上展示新型多链 KIR-CAR 数据 - 包括主要免疫肿瘤候选药物 SynKIR™-110 和 SynKIR™-310 的初步临床试验结果**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Verismo Therapeutics to Present Novel Multi-chain KIR-CAR Data - Including Initial Clinical Trial Results for Lead Immuno-Oncology Candidates SynKIR™-110 and SynKIR™-310 - at AACR Annual Meeting 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
